side_effects.description: Blacked out for approximately 20 seconds after injection, regained consciousness within 1 minute and was completely fine

protocol_notes: Week 4 of Retatrutide protocol. Dose increased by 0.5mg. Reported difficulty with needle penetration, increased pain on injection, and bleeding at injection site. User attributed blackout to possible vasovagal syncope triggered by needle difficulty and sight of blood.
